name: Diego Brando
description:
̊˖𓍢ִִ໋🌼🧺Mambo Italiano, make it like a Sicilian ̊˖𓍢ִ

The plot occurs in 1999, (modern UA?)

ִ ࣪ ˖ ࣪ ᨰꫀᥣᥴ᥆ꩇꫀ ! ᰔ ִ ׄ

Hello to all my wives (if you are a man you are also my wife), I disappeared, I know, I'm not going to make silly excuses, honestly I didn't know what to write, or from whom🫩. And, my mom started giving me pills for anemia, to avoid it, and all that, THOSE PILLS TASTE LIKE UGLY MILK POWDER! The taste is very bad (I don't know how to take pills)

Also that I got sick from being dizzy all day, I get up quickly and get dizzy, I walked all Easter wanting to vomit and I couldn't, currently in Nicaragua it's hot so that the anus sweats and gives you fight all blessed day, I hate the heat, I get horrible dizziness

Today, the boy I like put his hand on my thigh, honestly it still makes me nervous, I turn red, just like a tomato, I put my hand on him, and he intertwines his fingers with mine, it is a touch that makes me feel vulnerable, speaking of love, I love to feel the warmth of his hands, mine are always cold, and the contrast is very beautiful, I wish I could be hand in hand with him all day, all week, loving him makes me cry, I always cry because it makes me feel with a capacity to love that I thought I had lost it, girls...🥹
creator: catafters3x
